arts.ttl: Liverpool DEVASTATE Man Utd, Barca’s Olmo BLOW, Chelsea transfer ADMISSION
arts.sum: The January transfer window might not have produced a big deal yet, but there’s no shortage of drama, with Liverpool, Manchester United, Barcelona and Chelsea at the heart of matters. Liverpool DEVASTATE Man Utd, Barca’s Olmo BLOW, Chelsea transfer ADMISSION – FootballTransfers Recap

arts.ttl: Chelsea make RISKY decision over England star as Juventus make first offer
arts.sum: Chelsea have been offered the chance to re-sign Fikayo Tomori but will have to act quickly to beat Juventus to the signing of the AC Milan centre-back. Tomori left Chelsea in January 2021 for Milan on loan and ultimately secured a permanent move on a transfer worth €34 million.

arts.ttl: Maresca calm after Chelsea drop more points
arts.sum: Chesea reaction. The post Maresca calm after Chelsea drop more points appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace 1-1 Chelsea: Highlights, man of the match, stats from Premier League contest
arts.sum: Jean-Philippe Mateta cancels out an opener from Cole Palmer as Crystal Palace come from behind to draw 1-1 with Chelsea in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Chelsea drop more points as Mateta earns draw for Palace
arts.sum: Jean-Philippe Mateta scored a late equaliser for Crystal Palace, as Chelsea were held to a 1-1 draw that extended their Premier League winless run to four matches. Enzo Maresca's side had plenty of chances to increase their lead and secure a first league victory since 15 December but Nicolas Jackson and Josh Acheampong, among others, were guilty of spurning good opportunities.

arts.ttl: 'Need to know': Chelsea told exactly what they are 'lacking' after Crystal Palace game - it involves Moises Caicedo
arts.sum: Chelsea failed to relieve any of the growing pressure on them after slipping up again away to Crystal Palace on Saturday afternoon. The Blues went...

arts.ttl: Chelsea's missed chances vs. Palace show why they're not in title race
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca claims his side isn't ready to challenge for the title, despite its place in the table. And after a 1-1 draw with Palace, he might be right.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca insists £32m Chelsea star had 'good game' vs Crystal Palace despite one shocking statistic
arts.sum: Chelsea blew an advantage in Saturday’s 1-1 draw against Crystal Palace to drop more points in this poor run of form. It’s now four games...

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca makes dressing room demand to Chelsea players after fourth game without a win
arts.sum: Chelsea were held to a 1-1 draw by Crystal Palace in their latest Premier League outing after Enzo Maresca's side failed to make the most of their opportunities in front of goal

arts.ttl: Mike Dean blasts 'definite' penalty decision officials got wrong in Crystal Palace vs Chelsea
arts.sum: Former Premier League referee Mike Dean believes Chelsea should have been awarded a second-half penalty in their 1-1 draw with Crystal Palace on Saturday afternoon. I think Neto’s got there first, knocked the ball away and Mitchell’s caught him from behind," Dean said as Sky Sports' referee analyst upon review.
